evidence_boundary: local-only; operator-supervised; single repeatability run; fresh run ID; fresh output root; read-only against source evidence; wrapper executes no proposed commands; deterministic read-only consistency checker only; no readiness claim; no evidence promotion; no source-artifact mutation

metadata.repeatability_target: Repeat the same existing evidence packet consistency review pattern used by the first supervised use, using a fresh run ID and fresh output root.

requested_action: Repeat the same existing evidence packet consistency review pattern used by the first supervised use, using deterministic local packet consistency checking only.
